news.text: Gulf leaders to meet in Saudi Arabia to discuss response to Iranian strikes - Reuters
The Hormuz digital chokepoint: How does the Iran war threaten subsea cables? - Reuters
Coca-Cola is about to report earnings. Here's what to expect
Starbucks' turnaround enters a new phase: Investors want stronger profits served
U.S. is 'being humiliated by Iran,' says Germany's Merz, as Europe's patience wanes
Treasury yields rise as U.S.-Iran peace talks hit an impasse

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Futures are mixed with small gains as Iran tensions dominate headlines but VIX drops 3% suggesting markets are pricing in war fatigue rather than escalation. SPY holding above $715 while treasury yields climb on stalled peace talks. Pre-market volume remains light with financials leading and defensive sectors lagging hard.

◆ What to Watch

  • CB Consumer Confidence (2:00 PM) - Critical read on sentiment amid geopolitical chaos and rising yields
  • ADP Employment (12:15 PM) - Weekly jobs data could shift Fed expectations if it misses badly
  • Case-Shiller Housing Data (1:00 PM) - Triple dose of housing metrics with rates climbing toward 8%
  • Gulf Leaders Meeting - Saudi response to Iranian strikes could escalate or de-escalate quickly

◆ Sector Rotation

Classic risk-on rotation with financials up 0.76% on rising rates while defensive staples crater -1.07%. Tech holding modest gains despite Iran subsea cable threats. Real estate getting crushed -0.78% as housing data looms and mortgage rates spike.
⚡ Key Driver
Iran war fatigue meets rising yields - markets betting on contained conflict while Fed stays hawkish on sticky inflation
✦ Bull Case
VIX drop to 28.89 shows desensitization to geopolitical noise. Financials ripping on rate environment while small caps outperforming.
⚠ Bear Case
Defensive sector collapse signals real fear beneath surface calm. Consumer confidence could crater if Iran situation worsens or housing data disappoints.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY $715 - Holding above keeps bulls in control, break below targets $710
  • QQQ $665 - Resistance right here, need clean break for tech continuation
  • VIX 30 - Back above signals real fear returning to market
  • XLF $45 - Financials leading charge, watch for momentum continuation

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
